articles.title: Oil May Hit New Highs If Hormuz Doesn't Reopen: Commerzbank
articles.summary: Thu Lan Nguyen, FX and commodity research head at Commerzbank, discusses the outlook for energy prices in light of ongoing tension in the Middle East. "If we go into the summer with closed Strait of Hormuz, I would expect oil prices, crude oil prices, to rise towards the highs that we've seen lately or even beyond that," she tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Palm Oil Markets Split as Indonesia Export Revamp Confuses Trade
articles.summary: Palm oil buyers are picking up spot cargoes at bargain rates even as futures prices climb, as traders attempt to understand the impact of a radical export overhaul announced by top producer Indonesia earlier this week.
